What We Do

Our Pest Control Services

From homes to offices — we handle every infestation with precision, using government-approved, eco-friendly treatments.

🤧 Most Popular
Cockroach & Lizard Control
Gel bait and spray treatment targeting cracks, drains, kitchen cabinets, and wall voids. Complete elimination guaranteed with a follow-up check after 15 days.
🏗 Construction Phase
Pre-Construction Termite Treatment
Chemical soil barrier at foundation level during construction. Protects your building from termite entry for years. Completion certificate issued.
🐛 Existing Buildings
Post-Construction Termite Treatment
Drilling, injection, and soil rodding to eliminate existing termite colonies and prevent further damage to walls, floors, and woodwork.
🛌 Highly Effective
Bed Bug Removal
Steam + chemical spray + protective powder treatment to eliminate all life stages — eggs, nymphs, and adults. Sleep peacefully again.
🏠 Residential
Home Pest Control
Ants, mosquitoes, spiders, centipedes, silverfish — comprehensive home treatment. One-time or Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC) available.
🏢 For Businesses
Commercial Pest Control
Discreet, scheduled pest control for restaurants, offices, hotels, shops & warehouses. Maintain hygiene standards with regular AMC visits.

“Creating healthier spaces by eliminating pests with safe, proven methods — one home at a time.”
— Our Mission · Est. 2014
Our Story

A Family Built on Trust

Maruthi Pest Control was born from a simple conviction — every family in Ongole deserves to live in a clean, healthy, pest-free home. What started as a small, community-focused operation has grown into the region’s most trusted pest control service.

Our founder witnessed firsthand the health hazards caused by termite infestations and cockroach-ridden kitchens. That personal experience drives every treatment we carry out — with the care and thoroughness we’d want for our own family.

Over 500 households and businesses later, we remain rooted in the community — Ongole’s own pest control team, serving Ongole with pride.

2014
Year Founded
AMC
Annual Plans Available
Our Work

What We Do, Beautifully

A glimpse into how our team works — methodical, safe, and thorough at every step.

01
Thorough Inspection
Our technician inspects every corner — walls, ceilings, cabinets, drains — to identify pest type and infestation level before treatment.
02
Targeted Spray Treatment
Government-approved chemicals are applied precisely to affected areas using professional-grade equipment — safe for your family and pets.
03
Termite Barrier Treatment
Strategic drilling and chemical injection creates an invisible barrier that blocks termite entry at foundation level — protecting your building for years.
04
Bed Bug Elimination
Mattresses, headboards, and furniture are treated with steam and chemical spray — eliminating every life stage of bed bugs completely.
05
Completion & Certificate
Every treatment comes with a service report. Termite treatments include an official completion certificate — valid for warranty claims.
06
Free Follow-Up Visit
Not satisfied? We come back — free of charge. Our warranty period ensures your space stays pest-free, or we retreat at no extra cost.
